# The seven agent kinds. Contract G.9.
# tatara-operator/internal/agent/pod.go carries a byte-identical copy of this
# file at internal/agent/testdata/agent-kinds.txt. If the two ever differ, a
# pod is spawned with a TATARA_TOOL_PROFILE the cli does not know, the cli
# fails closed to six tools with no submit_outcome, and the Task can never
# terminate. That is not hypothetical: it is exactly what happened to every
# clarify pod before 2026-07-12 (contract L.5).
brainstorm
clarify
documentation
implement
incident
refine
review
